info.title: SILICOFELLER Quantum Studio API
info.description: AI-augmented quantum hardware EDA platform — V2. DesignGraph → Constraints → Placement → Routing → DRC → Qiskit Metal → Tapeout.

schema.title: Response Generate Generate Post

post.description: Generate runnable Qiskit Metal Python from Quantum Editor JSON.

schema.title: Response Generate Metal Code Api Generate Metal Code Post

post.description:
Standalone IBM-style frequency planning.
Returns qubit A/B groups, EJ/EC, resonator band 6.3–7.2 GHz, λ/4 lengths,
collision warnings.

schema.title: Response Frequency Plan Api Generate Frequency Plan Post

post.description:
Graph-solver physical placement for a given topology.
Uses Kamada-Kawai layout (falls back to deterministic grid).

schema.title: Response Placement Api Generate Placement Post

post.description:
Run 7-rule DRC: spacing, CPW dimensions, frequency collision,
resonator uniqueness, dispersive detuning, feedline clearance,
geometry overlap pre-check.

schema.title: Response Drc Check Api Generate Drc Post

post.description: Build the chip connectivity netlist (qubits, resonators, coupling edges).

schema.title: Response Netlist Api Generate Netlist Post

post.description:
Phase 9 stub: EM simulation parameters.
Returns simulation targets for HFSS / Sonnet / OpenEMS.
Full integration requires Ansys HFSS or Sonnet licence + renderer.

post.description: Parse QCLang source and return AST + validation errors.

schema.title: Response Parse Qclang Api Qclang Parse Post

post.description:
Parse, validate, and compile QCLang source.

Auto-detects dialect:
  • .qcl (chip{} braces) → full QChipLang compiler → supports qiskit_metal | json_ir | spice
  • .qc  (chip…end)       → simple compiler → qiskit_metal only

Returns GenerateResponse-compatible result.

schema.title: Response Compile Qclang Api Qclang Compile Post

post.description: Parse + save a QCLang file to a project.

Response Chat Api Claude Chat Post

post.description:
Full V2 constraint-driven design pipeline.

Pipeline: Constraints → Graph → Validation → Frequency Plan
          → Placement → Routing → DRC → Qiskit Metal Code → Exports

schema.title: Response Generate Design Api Design Generate Post

post.description:
Run the V2 pipeline from an existing graph JSON
(e.g. drawn in the schematic editor).

schema.title: Response Generate From Graph Api Design Generate From Graph Post

post.description:
NL prompt → DesignDocument via the Claude constrained-JSON + fallback ladder.

Uses the three-tier NL→graph pipeline:
  1. Claude tool-call (forced DesignIntent JSON schema)
  2. ML intent resolver fallback
  3. Regex parse_prompt fallback

Returns the full pipeline result including ``design`` (DesignDocument),
``graph``, ``freq_plan``, ``drc``, ``code``, ``qclang``, and ``issues``
(structured warnings from intent resolution and compilation).

schema.title: Response From Prompt Api Design From Prompt Post

post.description: Structural graph validation — fast, no physics computation.

schema.title: Response Validate Graph Api Design Validate Post

post.description:
Run routing on a placement dict (from /api/generate/placement).
Returns coupler, resonator, and feedline route segments.

post.description: Run the advanced 4-domain DRC (geometry, frequency, fabrication, connectivity).

post.description:
